spec_match.rationale: Excellent demonstration of DOM parsing behavior. Accurately captures ProcessingInstruction nodes (nodeType 7) and displays their target/data structures.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive playground: processes text updates in real-time, highlights parsed nodes with tags, renders complete recursive DOM trees, and offers click-to-load presets.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the parent index.html blurb about the live HTML editor.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now uses a complete escapeHtml helper that coerces to string and escapes &, <, >, double quotes, and single quotes before dynamic inspector output is written via innerHTML.

references.rationale: The page now includes the required ChromeStatus reference link https://chromestatus.com/feature/6534495085920256 in a see-also section.

design_system.rationale: Consistent design: uses neat grids, ivory input cards, green labels, and ivory code blocks.

summary: The previously open ProcessingInstruction escaping and reference issues have been resolved; the page now clears the critique follow-up items.
